game.assembly_color_taken: You already have a module of that system
game.assembly_color_taken_theirs: The rival already has a module of that system
game.assembly_color_mismatch: That card doesn't fit that system
game.assembly_nothing_to_spread: You have no breakdowns to spread onto clean modules
game.assembly_no_attackable: No rival has a module that can take it
game.assembly_nothing_to_fix: You have no module to apply it to
game.assembly_nothing_to_steal: There is no module you can requisition
game.assembly_pick_give_slot: Which of your modules do you give in exchange?
game.assembly_hit_shieldBurned: {{target}}'s $t({{piece}}) shield absorbs the hit and burns
game.assembly_hit_shieldBurned_victim: Your $t({{piece}})'s shield absorbs the hit and burns
game.assembly_remedy_locked_self: You certify your $t({{piece}}): untouchable for good!
game.assembly_swapped_self: You hand over your $t({{given}}) and take {{target}}'s $t({{piece}})
game.assembly_swapped_victim: {{player}} takes your $t({{piece}}) and leaves you their $t({{given}})!
game.assembly_help_piece: Module: install it in your workshop (one per system). The first player with {{goal}} distinct operational systems wins.
game.assembly_help_piece_wild: Joker module: counts as whichever system you are missing. Only one allowed, and the first player with {{goal}} distinct operational systems wins.
game.assembly_help_attack: Breakdown: thrown at a rival's {{system}}, leaving it broken (it doesn't count toward winning). A second breakdown destroys it. On a shielded module it burns the shield. Certified modules are untouchable.
game.assembly_help_remedy: Repair for {{system}}: if it's broken, it fixes it; if it's healthy, it shields it (the next breakdown burns the shield); a second shield certifies it: untouchable forever.
game.assembly_help_swap: Swap one of your modules for a rival's, breakdowns and shields included. Certified modules can't move, and no workshop may end with two modules of one system.
game.assembly_help_steal: Take a rival's (non-certified) module into a system you are missing, state included.
game.assembly_help_plague: Your breakdowns jump onto rivals' clean modules, system by system. You need at least one breakdown of your own with a valid destination.
game.assembly_help_fullswap: Swap your entire workshop with a rival of your choice, certified modules included.

cards.sobrecarga_played_victim: {{player}} overloads your reactor! It crackles alarmingly
cards.fuga_played: {{player}} opens a leak in {{target}}'s life support!
cards.fuga_played_self: You open a leak in {{target}}'s life support!
cards.fuga_played_victim: {{player}} opens a leak in your life support! Hissss…
cards.corrupcion_played_victim: {{player}} corrupts your data core! The screen fills with garbage
cards.grieta_played_victim: {{player}} cracks your hull frame! The whole thing creaks
cards.averia_omni_played_self: You throw a systems failure at {{target}}!
cards.averia_omni_played_victim: {{player}} throws a systems failure at you! It can break anything
cards.grua_played: {{player}} swaps a module with {{target}} using the crane
cards.grua_played_self: You swap a module with {{target}} using the crane
cards.grua_played_victim: {{player}} swaps a module with you using the crane!
cards.requisa_played_victim: {{player}} requisitions one of your modules! Off to their workshop it goes
cards.fuga_en_cadena_played: {{player}} triggers a chain leak! Their breakdowns jump to other workshops
cards.fuga_en_cadena_played_self: You trigger a chain leak! Your breakdowns jump to other workshops
cards.inspeccion_played: {{player}} calls the imperial inspection! Everyone else discards their hand
cards.inspeccion_played_self: You call the imperial inspection! Everyone else discards their hand
cards.permuta_played_self: You trade your whole workshop with {{target}}'s!
cards.permuta_played_victim: {{player}} trades their whole workshop with yours!
